retry_reason: Failure occurs when the compat file is missing; retrying without changed conditions is unlikely to succeed.
contract_summary: Get-or-create wrapper for a compat vDSO dso object. Returns a dso with an acquired reference (either via dsos__find which increments an existing refcount, or via __machine__addnew_vdso which initializes a new refcount to 1). The caller must call dso__put on the returned dso when done to release the reference. Returns NULL if the compat file is unavailable. The caller must check the return value and handle NULL appropriately.
